flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Randall University fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (65.6% → 56.2%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 12 pp at Randall University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (20.5% vs 32.3%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Randall University rose 195% between 2021 and 2024 (5.6% → 16.4%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Randall University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.3% → 0.0%).
